theme: Partisan Perceptual Gaps and Media Influence

theme: Violence as a Radical Fringe Phenomenon
description: Support for violence is statistically low and concentrated among vocal, radicalized minorities, though respondents differ on whether 10% represents a negligible minority or a dangerous threat.
